title: Template Library
description: Learn how to register Google Slides templates, classify them by touch type, trigger ingestion, and monitor AI-powered content analysis.

steps.narration: Welcome to the Template Library. This is where you register and manage your Google Slides templates. You can see we already have four templates that have been ingested and analyzed by the AI.
Each template card shows the ingestion status and slide count. The green checkmarks mean these templates have been fully analyzed -- their slides are classified and ready for deck generation.

callout.text: Ingested templates are ready for deck generation

steps.narration: Let's register a new template. Click the Add Template button to open the registration form.
Paste the Google Slides URL for the template you want to register. This tells AtlusDeck where to find the presentation file in your Google Drive.
Select the touch type classification for this template. Touch types determine which stage of the sales cycle this template is designed for.
Submit the form to register the template. AtlusDeck will validate access to the Google Slides file and queue it for ingestion.
The new template is now being ingested. You can see the progress indicator showing that the AI is analyzing each slide -- extracting text, identifying elements, and classifying content.

callout.text: AI is analyzing slides in real time

steps.narration: Ingestion is complete. The AI has processed all slides and generated descriptions, element maps, and content classifications for the new template.

The ingestion results include AI-generated descriptions for each slide, element maps showing text and image locations, and classifications by industry, persona, and funnel stage. This intelligence powers smarter deck generation.

callout.text: AI descriptions, element maps, and classifications

steps.narration: Templates you register here will appear in the Slide Library, where you can browse individual slides and their metadata. The more templates you ingest, the smarter your deck generation becomes.
Back on the grid, you can see all five templates now -- including the one we just registered. The Template Library is your foundation for building intelligent, personalized decks.
That's the Template Library. Register your Google Slides templates, let the AI analyze them, and you're ready to generate personalized decks for every sales conversation.
